symbols.name: FunctionalClient
symbols.description: A client that delegates each method to a config function.

symbols.name: FunctionalClientConfig
symbols.description: Configuration for FunctionalClient. Each method is optional — missing methods return sensible defaults.

symbols.name: PersistenceRecord
symbols.description: Persistence record with timestamp

symbols.name: WriteResult
symbols.description: Result of a write operation

symbols.name: ReadResult
symbols.description: Result of a read operation

symbols.name: ReadMultiResultItem
symbols.description: Result for a single URI in a multi-read operation

symbols.name: ReadMultiResult
symbols.description: Result of reading multiple URIs in a single operation

symbols.name: DeleteResult
symbols.description: Result of a delete operation

symbols.name: ListItem
symbols.description: Item returned from list operations

symbols.name: ListOptions
symbols.description: Options for list operations

symbols.name: ListResult
symbols.description: Result of a list operation

symbols.name: HealthStatus
symbols.description: Health status response

symbols.name: ValidationFn
symbols.description: Validation function for write operations Returns an object with valid boolean and optional error message

symbols.name: Schema
symbols.description: Schema mapping program keys to validation functions

symbols.name: ReceiveResult
symbols.description: Result of a receive operation

symbols.name: Message
symbols.description: Message type — the minimal primitive: [uri, data]

symbols.name: NodeProtocolWriteInterface
symbols.description: NodeProtocolInterface - The universal interface implemented by all clients

symbols.name: ClientError
symbols.description: Error class for client operations Preserves error context without hiding details

symbols.name: LinkValue
symbols.description: Link value - just a string URI pointing to another resource

symbols.name: ContentData
symbols.description: Content-addressed data metadata (optional wrapper for hash:// data)

symbols.name: WebSocketRequest
symbols.description: WebSocket protocol types for request/response communication

symbols.name: isBinary
symbols.description: Check if a value is a Uint8Array or ArrayBuffer

symbols.name: isEncodedBinary
symbols.description: Check if a value is an encoded binary object

symbols.name: encodeBinaryForJson
symbols.description: Encode binary data for JSON storage Returns the original value if not binary

symbols.name: decodeBinaryFromJson
symbols.description: Decode binary data from JSON storage Returns the original value if not encoded binary
